label: Midnight Express — Tier 1 evaluation (complex, single culprit)

probe_topics: their reason for being on the Midnight Express tonight
where they were when the train pulled into Cobblefield Station
their relationship with the other passengers and crew
what they know about the sealed crate of birds
their handling of tickets, keys, or the conductor's satchel
their movements through the carriages between midnight and dawn
their feelings about the loose birds and the bird heist
